title: Better Smithing Upgrades
description: Upgrade any equipment on the smithing table, without losing enchantments.
body:
![Better Upgrade Templates Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3D3O1DPX/images/9f6299fc39d11306ae45a8c6d402f9fb01880e67.png)

About

This mod expands the concept of smithing upgrades beyond Netherite, adding upgrade recipes for all tools and armor from Wood and Leather up to Diamond.

You can now keep the same gear throughout your playthrough and upgrade it along the way, without losing your enchantments!

Content

Basic Upgrade Smithing Template: Similar to the Netherite Upgrade Template but for lower-tier equipment. Can be found in most structures or crafted from Quartz and a couple other ingedients.

Iron Upgrade Part: Used to upgrade Wood, Stone, Leather or Chainmail equipment to Iron level. Craftable from 4 Iron Ingots. Can be found in many loot chests.

Gold Upgrade Part: Used to upgrade Iron equipment to Gold level. Craftable from 4 Gold Ingots. Quite common in loot chests but less than its Iron counterpart.

Diamond Upgrade Part: Used to upgrade Gold equipment to Diamond level. Craftable from 4 Diamonds. Quite rate, can only be found in certain structures.

Netherite Upgrade Part: Used to upgrade Diamond equipment to Netherite level. Craftable from 4 Netherite Ingot (gives x4 Upgrade Parts). Can be found only in the rarest and most difficult to access structures.

Base Edition vs. Advanced Edition

• The "base" edition adds the above content without altering the base game.
• The "advanced" edition adds the above content and removes vanilla crafting recipes for iron, gold and diamond equipment, forcing gear progression using smithing upgrades.

Pick the one that best fits your playstyle!

Tools for modpacks

You can make any equipment upgradable to iron/gold/diamond/netherite tier (including equipment from other mods), using item tags:

• Make an item upgradable to iron tier: upgradable/iron_[axe/boots/chestplate/etc.]
• Make an item upgradable to gold tier: upgradable/gold_[axe/boots/chestplate/etc.]
• Make an item upgradable to diamond tier: upgradable/diamond_[axe/boots/chestplate/etc.]
• Make an item upgradable to netherite tier: upgradable/netherite_[axe/boots/chestplate/etc.]

Structure is as follows: better_smithing_upgrades:{tag}

Compatibility

Show spoiler

- Create
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Farmer's Delight
- Create Jetpack
- Tom's Simple Storage

Credits

All custom textures used (if any) are either created by me or have a license that allows modification and distribution.

I make every effort to comply with project license obligations and to always credit the original owners. If you believe your name is missing from the credits or if you decide to change your project's license, please contact me.

Credits:
- Malcolmriley's Repository (CC License) for the upgrade parts textures.

Dependencies

This mod has no dependencies.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the CurseForge launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
